creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
This is still a problem here.

Here's some additional info...

# sh -x /usr/local/bin/sane-config --libs
+ PACKAGE=sane-backends
+ scriptname=sane-config
+ prefix=/usr/local
+ exec_prefix=/usr/local
+ export PKG_CONFIG_LIBDIR=/usr/local/lib/pkgconfig
+ export PKG_CONFIG_PATH=
+ pkgconfig_package=sane-backends
+ test 1 -eq 0
+ test 1 -gt 0
+ pkg-config --libs sane-backends
Package sane-backends was not found in the pkg-config search path.
Perhaps you should add the directory containing `sane-backends.pc'
to the PKG_CONFIG_PATH environment variable
No package 'sane-backends' found

# pkg-config --libs sane-backends
-L/usr/local/lib -lsane  

# PKG_CONFIG_LIBDIR=/usr/local/lib/pkgconfig pkg-config --libs
sane-backends Package sane-backends was not found in the pkg-config
search path. Perhaps you should add the directory containing
`sane-backends.pc' to the PKG_CONFIG_PATH environment variable
No package 'sane-backends' found

I.e., pkg-config works fine as is, but setting PKG_CONFIG_LIBDIR but not
setting PKG_CONFIG_PATH, as the current sane-config script does, breaks
things.

	-jr
